---
title: "Customer Churn Analysis"
description: "Analyzed customer churn patterns using Python and data analysis techniques."
categories: [Python, Data Analysis, Machine Learning]
image: proj1.png
---

## Overview

This project analyzes customer behavior data from a mobile service provider to identify key drivers of churn.

## Key Insights

- Identified patterns in customer behavior associated with churn
- Highlighted key variables influencing retention
- Provided data-driven recommendations

## Tools

Python, pandas, matplotlib, Jupyter Notebook

## Notebook

[View Analysis Notebook](https://nbviewer.org/github/rsm-jih204/Customer-analysis/blob/main/s-mobile.ipynb)

## GitHub

[View Repository](https://github.com/rsm-jih204/Customer-analysis)
